stemHtml: An executive aircraft is performing an approach to aerodrome A in bad weather. The conditions mean the pilot must divert to aerodrome B. However, the passenger, who is part of senior management in your company, insists that the pilot lands at aerodrome A. What could this be an example of if the pilot is conditioned to obey authority and continue the approach to aerodrome A?

options.a: Complacency on the part of the pilot and impulsivity on the part of the passenger.
options.b: National culture overriding the safety culture.
